personalInfo.name: Rafiul Islam
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.subtitle: Crafting premium web experiences & high-performance applications
personalInfo.bio: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in modern web technologies. I specialize in building scalable, responsive, and visually stunning web applications with Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. I love turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly digital solutions.

projects.title: Zenith - Collaborative Workspace
projects.description: A premium team productivity hub featuring real-time kanban boards, live chat, document sharing, and detailed progress analytics.

projects.title: NovaFinance - Wealth Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive wealth tracking dashboard displaying real-time financial markets, transaction categorization, and automated budget analytics.

projects.title: DevLink - Tech Social Network
projects.description: A developer-focused social platform where users can share code snippets, write tech articles, seek help, and connect with other developers.

projects.title: AlgoVis - Sorting Visualizer
projects.description: An educational tool simulating and visualizing sorting algorithms like QuickSort, MergeSort, and HeapSort in real time.

experience.description: Leading the frontend transition to Next.js App Router and optimizing web vitals. Architecting database structures in PostgreSQL and MongoDB for high-scale applications.
Developed backend APIs using Express and Node.js. Designed interactive user interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS. Implemented automated testing and CI/CD pipelines.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.description: Specialized in Software Engineering and Algorithms. Core coursework in Advanced Programming, Database Systems, and Network Security.

journey.title: First Open Source Contribution
journey.subtitle: GitHub Community
journey.description: Contributed bug fixes and documentation to popular open-source React libraries, sparking a passion for collaborative development.

journey.title: Full Stack Developer Internship
journey.subtitle: ByteCraft Tech
journey.description: Built production-ready REST APIs and React dashboards during university, bridging academic theory with real-world engineering.

journey.title: Hackathon Winner — DevFest Dhaka
journey.subtitle: Google Developer Groups
journey.description: Led a team of four to build a real-time collaboration tool, winning Best Full Stack Project among 40+ teams.

journey.title: Started Freelance Development
journey.subtitle: Independent
journey.description: Began taking on freelance projects for startups and SMEs, delivering end-to-end web solutions with Next.js and Node.js.

footer.tagline: Building the web, one pixel at a time.
